display.purpose: Hero h1 only. One per section maximum.

headline.purpose: Section h2. Drives reading rhythm between sections.

title.purpose: Feature h3, form headings, callout subheadings.

body.purpose: Mission text, feature descriptions, form copy. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: All machine-readable data: incident numbers, timestamps, codes, field labels, nav, button text.

shadows.name: structural-float
shadows.purpose: Hero mockup device frames only. Treats devices as physical objects in a scene. Not used on UI surfaces, cards, or interactive elements.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Background color transitions on buttons and feature cells. State changes only - no entrance animations, no layout animations.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column layout. Navigation hidden; CTA buttons remain.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA on dark surfaces. One per visual region maximum.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 22px; font-family: 'Oswald', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; background: #c8362c; color: #f3eee5; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #8c2018; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c8362c; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action alongside a primary CTA on dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 22px; font-family: 'Oswald', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; background: transparent; color: #f3eee5; border: 1px solid rgba(243, 238, 229, 0.35); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(243, 238, 229, 0.08); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c8362c; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Block Button
components.description: Primary CTA on light (cream) surfaces. Form submit, card CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-block { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 14px 26px; font-family: 'Oswald', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; background: #0e1013; color: #f3eee5; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-block:hover { background: #c8362c; } .ds-btn-block:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c8362c; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-block:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Section Tag
components.description: Numbered section label. Mono text preceded by a 28px signal-red rule. Used above every section h2.
components.css: .ds-section-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.20em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c8362c; } .ds-section-tag::before { content: ''; display: inline-block; width: 28px; height: 2px; background: #c8362c; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Form Field
components.description: Underline-only input on cream surfaces. No box, no radius.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4a4842; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-field-input { font-family: 'Source Sans 3', 'Source Sans Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #0e1013; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 1.5px solid #1a1d22; padding: 8px 0 9px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-field-input:focus { border-bottom-color: #c8362c; } .ds-field-input::placeholder { color: #9e9887; }

components.name: Incident Tag
components.description: Compact incident-type classification chip. Four variants: fire, ems, haz, svc.
components.html: FireEMSHazSvc
components.css: .ds-tags-demo { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; } .ds-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 6px; font-family: 'Oswald', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-tag--fire { background: rgba(200, 54, 44, 0.14); color: #c8362c; } .ds-tag--ems { background: rgba(232, 161, 58, 0.18); color: #946615; } .ds-tag--haz { background: #1a1d22; color: #e8a13a; } .ds-tag--svc { background: #e2dccc; color: #4a4842; }

components.name: Feature Cell
components.description: Numbered module cell in the features grid. Full-border grid pattern - not a standalone card.
components.html:
01 / NERIS

Incident Reporting

Full NERIS data model with NFIRS crosswalk. Auto-pulls from CAD, geocodes addresses, files to state in two clicks.
components.css: .ds-feature-cell { padding: 36px 32px; background: #0e1013; border: 1px solid rgba(243, 238, 229, 0.28); min-height: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-feature-cell:hover { background: #14171c; } .ds-feature-num { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #c8362c; letter-spacing: 0.14em; margin-bottom: 18px; } .ds-feature-title { font-family: 'Oswald', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #f3eee5; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-feature-body { color: #d9d3c6; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', 'Source Sans Pro', sans-serif; font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.55; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Top bar navigation. Uppercase condensed, signal-red underline on hover.
components.html: ModulesMissionCompare
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { color: #f3eee5; font-family: 'Oswald', Impact, 'Arial Narrow', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 13px; padding: 6px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { border-bottom-color: #c8362c; } .ds-nav-link--active { border-bottom-color: #c8362c; }

narrative.overview:
Every apparatus bay has a duty board: a whiteboard or grease-pencil board with the shift roster, unit assignments, and open calls. Nothing decorates it. Nothing on it is there because someone thought it looked good. It exists because it has to exist, and its authority comes from being complete, legible, and true. Halligan's visual system works the same way. Dark ink surfaces read like the board's backing. Warm cream records read like the chalk. Signal red fires like the indicator light over the door.

The palette is heavy where it needs to carry authority, warm where it needs to carry trust. Oswald condensed uppercase is stenciled apparatus lettering, not a typeface choice made in a branding meeting. JetBrains Mono is the CAD terminal, the log entry, the field label. Source Sans 3 is the body of the report, the words a chief actually reads. The system does not pursue visual novelty. It pursues legibility at speed, under pressure, on whatever device is at hand.

This system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS startup aesthetic: gradient-heavy hero sections, sans-serif minimalism with abstract blob illustrations, AI-powered badge language, and Intercom-style product screenshots.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-primary: station ink surfaces dominate, duty log cream surfaces are records and forms
Condensed uppercase display type throughout all headings, navigation, and buttons
Monospace for all machine-readable data: incident numbers, timestamps, field labels, meta
Signal red is earned: reserved for active status, true calls to action, and the one brand accent
Flat and tonal: depth through surface contrast, not shadows
Sharp geometry: zero or minimal radius throughout; no soft corners

rules.name: The Alarm Rule
rules.body: Box Red appears on 15% or less of any given screen. Its scarcity is the mechanism. When it appears on a button, a status pip, or an incident number, it reads as a live signal because it never appeared anywhere else.

rules.name: The Two-World Rule
rules.body: Dark surfaces (Station Ink, Apparatus Steel, Tool Finish) and light surfaces (Duty Log Cream) do not mix within a single section. Sections alternate between worlds. Forms and records are always light. Operational content defaults to dark.

rules.name: The Stencil Rule
rules.body: Oswald is always uppercase. Never sentence-case on headings, buttons, or navigation. Oswald in sentence case loses its condensed authority and reads as a cheap weight substitute.

rules.name: The Terminal Rule
rules.body: Any piece of data that could appear on a CAD screen or a dispatch log uses JetBrains Mono: incident numbers, timestamps, radio designations, addresses, roster units, compliance codes.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: UI surfaces have no shadow at rest, hover, or focus. If depth is needed between two surfaces, step between Station Ink, Apparatus Steel, and Tool Finish. Shadows on interactive elements are prohibited.

dos: Do use Box Red only for live action: primary CTAs, active states, incident status pips, module identifiers.
Do uppercase all Oswald usage: headings, buttons, navigation, section tags — always uppercase.
Do use JetBrains Mono for any data that would appear in a dispatch log or CAD screen.
Do alternate sections between dark (Station Ink) and light (Duty Log Cream) surfaces. Keep entire sections in one world.
Do use tonal steps (Station Ink to Apparatus Steel to Tool Finish) to express depth within dark surfaces.
Do use full borders on the feature grid container so cells share borders rather than each having four independent sides.
Do keep button radius at zero. The sharp edge is the point.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Use a single solid color.
Don't use side-stripe borders wider than 1px as a decorative accent on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't use generic SaaS startup aesthetics: gradient-heavy heroes, blob illustrations, AI-powered badge language, rounded pill buttons.
Don't apply glassmorphism or blurred backdrop surfaces anywhere in the system.
Don't add shadows to interactive elements at any state.
Don't use Alert Stripe amber in navigation, headings, or layout chrome.
Don't mix dark and light surfaces within a single content section.
Don't use Oswald in sentence case.
Don't use #000000 or #ffffff. Station Ink (#0e1013) and Duty Log Cream (#f3eee5) are the terminals.
